hero.body: SideKlick helps students turn class material into something useful right away, without copying everything into five different apps.

features.heading: How SideKlick helps while you study

weakSpots.body: It keeps track of weak spots from your study sessions, so the next quiz and plan are built around what still needs work.
weakSpots.imageAlt: SideKlick quiz screen showing strengths, gaps, and a targeted review question.

assist.body: Ask for help while reading notes, reviewing slides, or browsing course material and get support without breaking your flow.
assist.imageAlt: SideKlick assist panel answering a biology question and suggesting the next review step.

compare.heading: SideKlick vs Quizlet
compare.body: SideKlick adapts to how you study, what you miss, and what you need to be ready for next.

sideklick.name: SideKlick
sideklick.description: Learns from your class material and study habits

quizlet.name: Quizlet
quizlet.description: Better for flashcards and simple review

rows.label: Builds a plan to ace your test
Makes quizzes from what you know and do not know
Works from your real class material

download.heading: Ready to study from what actually happened in class?
download.body: Download SideKlick, connect it to your notes and materials, and let it help with the parts you are most likely to miss.
download.mobileDownloadTitle: Desktop app downloads are only available on desktop devices.

pricing.body: Study Credits power AI-heavy study actions like Cram Plans, point-leak reports, graded-work analysis, and deep cram reports. Subscriptions include monthly credits, and students can buy extra credits during heavy test weeks.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Start with a small monthly Study Credit balance for light quizzes and quick cram outputs.

plans.name: Plus
plans.description: For students who want full Cram Mode, weak-spot memory, and enough monthly credits for normal study weeks.

plans.name: Max
plans.description: For students who need deeper point-leak diagnosis, graded-work analysis, higher limits, and priority access to advanced beta features.
features: Priority access to advanced beta features

creditPacks.name: +50 Study Credits
creditPacks.description: A small top-up for a heavier week.

creditPacks.name: Finals Pack
creditPacks.description: Extra room for finals, midterms, and stacked deadlines.

foundingBetaHighlights.title: Founding beta
foundingBetaHighlights.body: Accepted founding beta users receive free lifetime individual access to Plus. Beta users can optionally purchase lifetime Max for $8.99. Lifetime access is for individual student use and remains subject to fair-use limits.

pricing.disclaimer: Plan credits refresh monthly and do not roll over. Purchased Study Credit packs persist until used. Max-only features require Max access even when a student has enough credits.

login.body: Sign in with the same managed account system used by the desktop app.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

foundingBetaPopup.heading: Free lifetime Plus for accepted students.
foundingBetaPopup.body: We are opening SideKlick to a small group of students before launch. Accepted founding beta users get free lifetime individual Plus, with an optional lifetime Max upgrade for $8.99.

footer.headline: Study smarter with the material you already have.
